purpose: Continuation roadmap for batch production, localization, style profiles, feedback loops, and upload boundary artifacts.

artifacts.purpose: Declare the source items, archetype/platform defaults, policy, budget, and output root for a multi-short run.
Append queue and stage events for claimed, started, completed, failed, skipped, and approval-needed job states.
Record manual or automated sample approval decisions and rerun actions.
Create durable review cards linking preview media, review status, publish package, rights, and asset ledger paths.
Summarize passed, failed, blocked, and publish-ready outputs for a batch.
Declare source and target language, provider constraints, subtitle mode, and localized metadata requirements.
Map source script, caption, title, description, hashtag, and cover text units to translated units.
Prepare translated speech segments with speaker, timing, speed, pronunciation, and emotion instructions.
Store localized caption groups reconciled to localized audio and platform safe zones.
Bind localized media, captions, title, description, hashtags, cover text, review, and rights status.
Record reusable channel or format defaults for captions, hook treatment, pacing, visual language, audio, thumbnails, and platforms.
Declare renderer template capabilities, required assets, caption modes, hook support, safe zones, known limits, and license notes.
Record how archetype, style profile, platform profile, request overrides, template, caption preset, and audio preset resolved.
Verify rendered output against the selected template contract and platform constraints.
Store platform outcome metrics linked to a publish package at a point in time.
Capture structured creator ratings, notes, tags, approval, and requested changes tied to run and variant IDs.
Compare hooks, packages, profiles, or templates against review, feedback, and performance evidence.
Attach human labels and failure tags to feature vectors for quality scorer calibration.
Summarize asset rights, source-media review, public-reference status, attribution requirements, and blockers.
Decide whether a package is package-only, manual handoff, scheduled upload, or direct-upload capable.
Record provider credential requirements without exposing secret values.
Prevent public-video reference workflows from becoming unreviewed repost automation.

gates: Batch execution must not bypass review bundle or rights gates.
Localization must time captions against localized audio.
Style profiles must resolve through template and platform constraints.
Feedback and platform outcomes must link back to publish packages or variants.
Upload automation remains blocked unless credentials, terms review, rights, and manual approval are explicit.
